---
title: "enrichRoast"
description: "Scripts and functions for limma::roast enrichment analyses."
---

enrichRoast contains scripts and functions for running `limma::roast` rotation gene set tests as part of proteomics workflows and producing tabular outputs and visualizations.

The repository supports enrichment analysis against gene set databases including GO, Reactome, KEGG, and MSigDB, with options for subcategories, gene-set size filters, p-value cutoffs, and filtering of redundant or non-interesting terms.

## Highlights

- Enrichment analysis utilities for proteomics workflows.
- Designed around `limma::roast` and MSstats-style data processing.
- Outputs include tables, figures, and reports.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/MiguelCos/enrichRoast)

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`enrichment analysis`]{.tag} [`limma`]{.tag} [`MSstats`]{.tag}
:::
